entities.name: MALI
entities.description: Country in West Africa where the study is focused

entities.name: WOMEN
entities.description: Primary actors in agricultural production in Mali facing systemic barriers

entities.name: INCLUSIVE SEED SYSTEMS
entities.description: Seed systems that ensure equitable access and participation for all actors, particularly women

entities.name: RESILIENT FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: Food systems capable of absorbing shocks and maintaining productivity

entities.name: HIGH-QUALITY SEEDS
entities.description: Seeds with superior genetic traits and purity required for better yields

entities.name: FINANCIAL CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Lack of capital or credit that limits agricultural investment

entities.name: LIMITED TECHNICAL TRAINING
entities.description: Lack of access to knowledge and skills for seed production

entities.name: FORMAL SEED PRODUCTION AND DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The organized system of producing and selling certified seeds

entities.name: WEAK MARKET INTEGRATION
entities.description: Poor connection between producers and markets

entities.name: INADEQUATE MECHANIZATION
entities.description: Lack of machinery to improve agricultural efficiency

entities.name: INSUFFICIENT PROCESSING INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: Lack of facilities to process raw crops into value-added products

entities.name: BIOFORTIFIED CROPS
entities.description: Crops bred to have higher micronutrient content

entities.name: VALUE-ADDED FOOD PRODUCTS
entities.description: Processed food items that command a higher market price

entities.name: GENDER-RESPONSIVE APPROACH
entities.description: A strategy that addresses the specific needs and constraints of different genders

entities.name: SEED-TO-NUTRITION PATHWAY
entities.description: The sequence of events from seed selection to the consumption of nutritious food

entities.name: NETWORKING FOR SEED PROJECT-PHASE II
entities.description: An initiative aimed at enhancing community seed systems and women's participation

entities.name: COMMUNITY SEED SYSTEMS
entities.description: Local systems of seed saving, sharing, and exchange

entities.name: WORLD FOOD PROGRAM
entities.description: International organization facilitating the processing and commercialization of biofortified crops

entities.name: PROCESSING, COMMERCIALIZATION, AND MARKET INTEGRATION
entities.description: The process of turning raw crops into products and selling them in markets

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The process of providing or obtaining the food necessary for health and growth

entities.name: FINANCIAL INCLUSION
entities.description: Access to useful and affordable financial products and services

entities.name: TECHNOLOGICAL TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used to improve agricultural productivity and business management

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL SUPPORT
entities.description: Support provided by government or non-governmental organizations

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL VALUE CHAINS
entities.description: The full range of activities required to bring a product from conception to final consumption

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: Reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: NUTRITION OUTCOMES
entities.description: The measurable results of nutritional intake and health

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of a system to recover from climate-related shocks
